entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Cultivated peanut (Arachis hypogaea L.) used in the study for resistance mapping.

entities.name: BACTERIAL WILT DISEASE
entities.description: A disease caused by Ralstonia solanacearum that affects peanut productivity.

entities.name: RALSTONIA SOLANACEARUM
entities.description: The bacterial pathogen that causes bacterial wilt disease in peanuts.

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: The geographical region where bacterial wilt disease is a major challenge for peanut production.

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO RALSTONIA SOLANACEARUM
entities.description: The genetic ability of peanut plants to resist infection by R. solanacearum.

entities.name: QTL-SEQ
entities.description: A sequencing-based trait mapping approach used to identify candidate genomic regions.

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to identify homozygous SNPs and InDels in resistant and susceptible parents.

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Homozygous genetic variations identified through whole genome resequencing.

entities.name: INDELS
entities.description: Insertions and deletions identified through whole genome resequencing.

entities.name: EUCLIDEAN DISTANCE
entities.description: A method used in QTL-seq analysis to associate genomic regions with the trait.

entities.name: SNP-INDEX
entities.description: A method used in QTL-seq analysis to associate genomic regions with the trait.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 12
entities.description: The specific chromosome containing the candidate genomic region associated with RRS.

entities.name: NBS-LRR GENES
entities.description: Nucleotide binding site leucine rich repeat putative resistant genes identified as important candidates.

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Validated markers used to identify phenotypic variation and for breeding disease-resistant varieties.
